title: NASH-357 Seduced by my younger mother-in-law ... - Mitsuha (Mitsuha Kikukawa)
description: This young daughter is a father who has reached his 60th birthday. It's strange to think about it. My father's property has been decided. For me, who has taken care of my father after my mother died, my second wife is a hindrance. I have to do something about this guy even with force ... One day, when she rushed to her mother-in-law who showed her true nature, she responded unexpectedly ... Includes 5 beautiful young wives!
